title: Social Worker (S$4000-S$5000)
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Develop professional & engaged relationship with clients and other key service stakeholders (e.g. Family Service Centres (FSCs), Social Service Offices (SSOs), Ministry of Social and Family Development (MSF), etc)
  • Conduct needs assessment and risk assessment for complex cases and refer to the relevant agencies for intensive case management.
  • Co-manage complex cases with the relevant agencies on a regular basis.
  • Prepare social reports / case recordings in accordance to the requirements and ensure documentations are in place.
  • Ensure database is timely updated.
  • Consistently collect relevant documents from clients to prepare for submission to funder at the end of the contract period.
  • Meet deadline for submission of reports.
  • Ensure files are adequately prepared for audit by funder.
  • Be present for the annual audit by funder.
  • Participate in case conferences as part of a multi-disciplinary team for complex cases.
  • Attend individual and group supervision as scheduled regularly.
  • Meet the supervision hours required by the funder.
  • Attend events / trainings organised for clients either during weekdays evening or weekends.
  • Participate in activities (e.g. Fundraising, teambuilding, etc)
  • Support other services e.g. Family Shelter, Individual Adults, Kampung Siglap Lifeskills Training and Retreat Centre, etc
  • Willing to work with the homeless and destitute.
  • Able to handle shelter residents politely yet firmly.
  • Understands the principles of engaging and working with vulnerable families and individuals.


Requirements:

  • Degree in Social Work from an accredited institution
  • Accredited as Registered Social Worker with SASW
  • At least 2 years of relevant working experience in similar sectors
  • Excellent interpersonal and communication skills for effective communication with residents, team, community partners, and stakeholders.
  • Excellent team player with strong leadership and responsibility skills.
  • Strong team player who is resourceful, adaptable, and able to perform multitasks under a given timeline.
  • Case management and casework knowledge and skills.
  • Risk assessment and risk management.
  • Good report writing skills.
  • Self-motivated individual with the ability to work independently.
  • Proficiency in IT Systems and Microsoft Office Suite (e.g., Microsoft Word, Excel, PowerPoint, etc.)​​​​​​​ 


Kindly email your Resume in MS Words Format to Mr Lex Ong Shee Hean (R1106602): lex@strategysolutions.com.sg

(NOTE: The following information should be Included in the Resume. Thank you)

  1. Date of Availability
  2. Detailed Job Scope
  3. Reason for Leaving for All Employments
  4. Salary Expectation


Shortlisted candidates will be notified for an interview.


MOM License: 09C3018

postedCompany.description:
Strategy Solutions Services specialize in finding the right fit of candidates with both speed and quality for your business. We offer a one-stop search services including Executive Search, Permanent Search, Career Planning and Analysis, Employee Retention Program & Training Development.
 
History
Since its inception in 2009, Quality, Speed & Customer Satisfaction has been the primary focus for Strategy Solutions Services.
 
We help our clients to discover talents with our experienced team of consultants by screening through our extensive database.
 
We will match their qualification, work experience and career goals and shortlist them for interview.
Our expertise lies in finding the right candidates with minimum fuss, at short notice and with maximum results.
 
In STRATEGY SOLUTIONS SERVICES, we believe that clients are our strategic partners in business and our staffs are our family. We will therefore offer the best staffing solutions to our clients while providing the best welfare and career development opportunities to our staff
 
 
Product & Services
Since our modest beginnings, we have rapidly progressed to covering a wide range of industries from Finance, Info-communication & Technology, Healthcare, Life Sciences, Engineering, Accounting, Human Resource, Sales & Marketing and Administration & Support. Understanding the importance of talent acquisition, we aim to provide HR solutions to companies that range from SMEs to Multinational Co.
postedCompany.name: STRATEGY SOLUTIONS SERVICES
